+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\n**The problem/use-case that the feature addresses**\n\nMake it run natively, without cygwin or wsl, on microsoft windows system."

+        "title": "Apply the fix for [NEW] Native windows support",
+        "description": "WiP to get build to work on Windows.\n\nMight be best to have many small PRs than one big PR that takes F-O-R-E-V-E-R to merge. So I've named this branch `win32-build0`.\n```yaml\nBSD-3 licensed https://github.com/microsoftarchive/redis:\n```"
+      },

+      "summary": "WiP to get build to work on Windows.\n\nMight be best to have many small PRs than one big PR that takes F-O-R-E-V-E-R to merge. So I've named this branch `win32-build0`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "BSD-3 licensed https://github.com/microsoftarchive/redis:",
+        "BSD-3 licensed valkey, though really hasn't changed apart from renaming and `clang-format`ting since 7dae142a2ebf909a63df13e5813c073c79be521f:",
+        "Again, nothing non-straightforward to port to MSVC.\n\nFinally let's look at:"
+      ]
